creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
Upgrade checksum and port to version 0.14
	Version 0.14 fixes an important bug, but can't find out what it is
	Need someone who uses it to test, couldn't compile because it requires xwindows

Fix: PORTNAME=      gatekeeper
-PORTVERSION=   0.12
-PORTREVISION=  1
+PORTVERSION=   0.14
 CATEGORIES=    net
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.willamowius.de/download/
-DISTNAME=      gk012
+DISTNAME=      gk014
+EXTRACT_SUFX=  .tgz

 MAINTAINER=    roger@FreeBSD.org
